commands.name: add-package
commands.description:
<description>  # Optional package description
license: <license>          # Optional package license
purl: <package-url>         # Optional package purl
cpe23: <cpe-identifier>     # Optional package cpe23
relationships:                # Optional relationships
- type: <relationship>        # Relationship type
element: <element>          # Related element
comment: <comment>          # Optional comment
- type: <relationship>        # Relationship type
element: <element>          # Related element
comment: <comment>          # Optional comment
The <relationship> argument describes the <package> relationship to <element>.
The <element> argument is the name of an element in the <to.spdx.json> file.
The <relationship> is defined by the SPDX specification, and is usually one of:
DESCRIBES, DESCRIBED_BY, CONTAINS, BUILD_TOOL_OF, ...

commands.name: copy-package
commands.description:
Copy package between SPDX documents (workflow only).
diagram <spdx.json> <mermaid.txt> [tools] Generate mermaid diagram.

commands.name: find-package
commands.description: Find package ID in SPDX document

commands.name: get-version
commands.description: Get the version of an SPDX package.

commands.name: hash
commands.description: Generate or verify hashes of files

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display extended help about a command

commands.name: rename-id
commands.description: Rename an element ID in an SPDX document.

commands.name: to-markdown
commands.description: Create Markdown summary for SPDX document

commands.name: update-package
commands.description:
<description>  # Optional new package description
license: <license>          # Optional new package license

options.name: --help
options.description: Show this help message and exit

options.name: --result
options.description: Self-validation result file (.trx or .xml for JUnit)
